mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents (file_id, owner_user_id, current_path, path_hash, original_name, current_version_id, current_revision_no, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{currentPath}, #{pathHash}, #{originalName}, #{currentVersionId}, #{currentRevisionNo}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT current_version_id AS currentVersionId, current_revision_no AS currentRevisionNo, status AS status FROM documents WHERE file_id = #{fileId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT current_path FROM documents WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT current_version_id FROM documents WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
